audience: SMEs and business owners setting an initial budget for an app, web application or custom platform.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Ondernemers helpen begrijpen welke factoren de prijs van een app bepalen en hoe ze offertes realistisch vergelijken.

searchIntent.question: Which factors determine app development costs, and how can a business compare proposals and phase a realistic budget?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs, with VisualVibe services based in Limburg, Belgium.

mainKeyword: how much does app development cost
directAnswer: There is no reliable standard app development price without knowing the users, functions, data and integrations. A realistic budget follows from user roles, business logic, platform choice, security, migration, ownership and maintenance, and should be phased through analysis, a prototype, an MVP and later extensions.
title: How much does app development cost? Factors, phases and budget
metaDescription: What does app development cost? Learn how features, roles, data, integrations, platforms, security and maintenance shape the budget and phases.
factsToPreserve: A reliable standard price cannot be given without users, functions, data and integrations.
Screen count is not a reliable proxy for technical complexity.
A web application may be more appropriate and economical than separate native apps.
Security and privacy requirements must be designed and tested rather than added at the end.
An MVP should contain the smallest usable core flow, not simply a cheap incomplete product.
External services, licences, app-store accounts, hosting and transaction costs may sit outside development fees.
Ownership, source code, accounts, documentation and access should be explicit in the proposal.
Fixed pricing requires agreed scope, assumptions, acceptance criteria and a change-request process.
Maintenance and further development require an ongoing budget after launch.
